name: form-tanstack-radiogroup

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## form-tanstack-radiogroup
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** @tanstack/react-form, zod

visual_summary: FormTanstackRadioGroup is a customizable radio button group form component. Use it when you need users to select one option from a set of provided choices. This component is suitable for desktop and tablet layouts, and can be modified for mobile use cases when more space is available.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-tanstack-radiogroup
Description: FormTanstackRadioGroup is a customizable radio button group form component. Use it when you need users to select one option from a set of provided choices. This component is suitable for desktop and tablet layouts, and can be modified for mobile use cases when more space is available.
Style: material, flat, responsive
Interactions: clickable, keyboard, accessible
Tags: radio, button, group, form, component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
